texto: The vigor I lacked for physical activities became incandescent when, pen in hand, I filled those pages with invented stories. Sometimes they were intimately about me – family tales, parental exploits – sometimes they became horrific stories sprinkled with torture, death, and reunion: crazy games and tear-soaked sagas.
explicacao: Citação de Philippe Grimbert sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “The vigor I lacked for physical activities became incandescent when, pen in hand, I filled those …” articula familia, stories, vigor em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como luto e vigor.
